title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 286.110 - Divisions of department created
text:
286.110.  Divisions of department created. — There is hereby created within the department the following divisions:
  (1)  The division of workers' compensation;
  (2)  The division of employment security; and
  (3)  The division of labor standards.
(L. 1945 p. 1101 § 12, A.L. 1947 V. II p. 278, A. 1949 S.B. 1102, A.L. 1995 H.B. 300 & 95)
